title: Fix: In 'model_routing' tasks, 'rate_limit' occurs 2x with 100% failure rate
description: Add/increase retry backoff for rate-limited endpoints

suggested_changes.action: Add retry with backoff for 'rate_limit' errors

sample_notes: Spawned 2 large subagents simultaneously on proxy-1. Both hit 429. Router has no concurrent-usage awareness — no quota tracking across parallel spawns. Fix: router should detect active proxy-1 load and fall back to OAuth for concurrent requests.

Intelligent router missing proactive health-based routing. Should track: (1) recent 429s per provider, (2) active concurrent sessions per provider, (3) skip degraded providers before attempting. Currently only reacts after failure — fallback chain fires too late. For parallel spawns, router must detect shared quota risk and preemptively use OAuth.
deployment_notes: NOTE_LOGGED: RSI recommendation logged: Fix: In 'model_routing' tasks, 'rate_limit' occurs 2x with 100% failure rate. Add/increase retry backoff for rate-limited endpoints
